page_content:
GRADUATION PLANS

Roadmaps for all graduation plans can be found here (http://4yearplans.umd.edu). Select the College of your major to ﬁnd the corresponding roadmap.

For more information on developing a graduation plan, please refer to the Student Academic Success-Degree Completion Policy (https:// academiccatalog.umd.edu/undergraduate/registration-academic- requirements-regulations/academic-advising/#success) section of this catalog.
